title.ko: 전자기록법; 전기사진법; 자기기록법
title.en: ELECTROGRAPHY; ELECTROPHOTOGRAPHY; MAGNETOGRAPHY

definition.ko: 원화상의 기록, 부재 및 재료 G03G5/00, G03G7/00, G03G9/00 일렉트로그래피의 공정 및 장치 대전상을 이용하는 것 G03G13/00, G03G15/00 대전상을 이외의 상을 이용하는 것 G03G17/00 열가소성층(THERMOPLASTIC LAYERS)의 변형 을 이용하는 것 G03G16/00 자기상을 이용하는 공정 및 장치 G03G19/00 달리 분류되지 않는 세부 G03G8/00, G03G11/00, G03G21/00

title.ko: 노출에 의한 원본 기록용 기록부재, 예. 빛, 열 또는 전자에 대한 것; 그것을 위한 제조; 그것을 위한 재료의 선택
title.en: Recording-members for original recording by exposure, e.g. to light, to heat or to electrons; Manufacture thereof; Selection of materials therefor

title.ko: 전하 수상층(5/153이 우선)
title.en: Charge-receiving layers (G03G0005153000 takes precedence)
Layers for surface-deformation imaging, e.g. frost imaging
Photoelectret layers
Layers in which during the irradiation a chemical reaction occurs whereby electrically conductive patterns are formed in the layers, e.g. for chemixerography
Layers in which after being exposed to heat patterns electrically conductive patterns are formed in the layers, e.g. for thermoxerography

title.ko: 광도전성층; 전하 발생층 또는 전하 수송층; 그것을 위한 첨가제 및 결합제
title.en: Photoconductive layers; Charge-generation layers or charge-transporting layers; Additives therefor; Binders therefor
Photoconductive layers characterised by having two or more layers or characterised by their composite structure
characterised by the charge-generation layers or charge-transporting layers
Organic bonding materials; Methods for coating a substrate with a photoconductive layer; Inert supplements for use in photoconductive layers
characterised by the photoconductive material being organic
Polymeric photoconductive materials
characterised by the photoconductive material being inorganic
and not being incorporated in a bonding material, e.g. vacuum deposited
and being incorporated in an inorganic bonding material, e.g. glass-like layers
and being incorporated in an organic bonding material

title.ko: 증감제 또는 활성제, 예. 염료(5/12가 우선)
title.en: Sensitisers or activators, e.g. dyestuffs (G03G0005120000 takes precedence)
Bases for charge-receiving or other layers
Recording members for multicolour processes

title.ko: 전하 수신층을 위한 불활성 중간층 또는 피복층 (광전도성, 전하 생성 또는 전하 수송층의 경우 G03G5/04)
title.en: Inert intermediate or cover layers for charge-receiving layers  (for photoconductive, charge-generation or charge-transporting layers G03G0005040000)
Cover layers
Charge-receiving layers combined with additional photo- or thermo-sensitive, but not photoconductive, layers, e.g. silver-salt layers
Layers for recording by changing the magnetic properties, e.g. for Curie-point-writing

title.ko: 이미지를 수신하는 부재에 사용할 재료의 선택, 즉. 물리적 접촉에 의해 반전하는 경우; 그것을 위한 제조
title.en: Selection of materials for use in image-receiving members, i.e. for reversal by physical contact; Manufacture thereof
Layers covering the final reproduction, e.g. for protecting, for writing thereon

title.ko: 현상제
title.en: Developers
the developer being electrolytic
with toner particles
Magnetic toner particles
Binders for toner particles
Colouring agents for toner particles
Encapsulated toner particles
Plasticisers; Charge controlling agents
characterised by carrier particles
having magnetic components
having coatings applied thereto
in liquid developer mixtures
characterised by the liquid
characterised by polymer components
characterised by stabiliser or charge-controlling agents

title.ko: 그룹 9/06 ～ 9/135에 분류되지 않는 현상제, 예. 용액, 에어졸
title.en: Developers not provided for in groups G03G0009060000-G03G0009135000, e.g. solutions, aerosols
Differentially-wetting liquid developers
Selection of substances for use as fixing agents

title.ko: 대전상을 사용하는 전자사진법 (G03G15/00, G03G16/00, G03G17/00이 우선)
title.en: Electrographic processes using a charge pattern (G03G0015000000, G03G0016000000, G03G0017000000 take precedence)
for multicoloured copies

title.ko: 감광화, 즉. 균일한 전하를 배치하는 것
title.en: Sensitising, i.e. laying-down a uniform charge

title.ko: 노출, 즉 광도전성 기록물질상에 원영상(original image)을 광학적으로 투사하는 것에 의한, 상에 따른(imagewise) 노출
title.en: Exposing, i.e. imagewise exposure by optically projecting the original image on a photoconductive recording material

title.ko: 기록 재료에 전하 패턴의 뚜렷한 부분을 대전하거나 방전하는 것, 예. 비이미지 영역의 방전 또는 대비 향상 (G03G13/34, G03G21/06이 우선)
title.en: Charging or discharging distinct portions of the charge pattern on the recording material, e.g. discharging non-image areas or contrast enhancement   (G03G0013340000, G03G0021060000 take precedence)

title.ko: 이미지 형상에 따른 대전, 즉. 전하패턴을 가진 광도전성 제어 스크린 또는 광에 의해 활성화되는 대전 수단에 의해 변조된 전하 입자 스트림, 예. 코로나 이온, 을 사용하여 원본 이미지의 구성에 전하를 부여하는 것
title.en: Imagewise charging, i.e. laying-down a charge in the configuration of an original image using a modulated stream of charged particles, e.g. of corona ions, modulated by a photoconductive control screen bearing a charge pattern or by optically activated charging means
using X-rays, e.g. electroradiography
using internal polarisation
Developing
using a solid developer, e.g. powder developer
using magnetic brush
Removing excess solid developer
using a liquid developer
Removing excess liquid developer, e.g. by heat
Transferring a pattern to a second base
of a toner pattern, e.g. a powder pattern
of a charge pattern
Fixing, e.g. by using heat

title.ko: 그룹 G03G13/02 ～ G03G13/20까지 2개 이상 공정의 조합을 포함하는 방법 (G03G13/01이 우선)
title.en: Processes involving the combination of more than one step according to groups G03G0013020000-G03G0013200000 (G03G0013010000 takes precedence)
specially adapted for copying both sides of an original or for copying on both sides of a recording or image-receiving material
whereby at least two steps are performed simultaneously
for the production of printing plates for non-xerographic printing processes
Planographic printing plates
Hectographic masters
Relief printing plates
Editing, i.e. producing a composite image by copying one or more original images or parts thereof

title.ko: 대전상을 이용하는 전자 사진법의 장치(G03G 16/00, G03G 17/00이 우선)
title.en: Apparatus for electrographic processes using a charge pattern (G03G0016000000, G03G0017000000 take precedence)

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서는 그 자체가 이 그룹에 분류되는 장치의 사용 또는 취급을 특징으로 하는 한 처리법도 포함한다

title.en: for producing multicoloured copies

title.ko: 균일대전장치, 예. 감광성을 부여하는 장치; 코로나 방전장치 (G03G15/14가 우선)
title.en: for laying down a uniform charge, e.g. for sensitising; Corona discharge devices (G03G0015140000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 노출장치, 즉 광전도성 기록물질상에 원상을 광학적 으로 투사하는 것에 의한, 상에 따른 노출을 위한 장치
title.en: for exposing, i.e. imagewise exposure by optically projecting the original image on a photoconductive recording material
with variable magnification

title.ko: 조도나 노출을 제어하기 위한 수단을 갖는 것 (G03G15/041이 우선)
title.en: with means for controlling illumination or exposure (G03G0015041000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 기록물질상의 전하패턴이 현저한 부위에 대한 대전 또는 방전을 위한 수단, 예. 대조 증대나 비화상 영역의 방전을 위한 수단을 갖는 것(G03G 15/36, G03G 21/06)
title.en: with means for charging or discharging distinct portions of the charge pattern on the recording material, e.g. for contrast enhancement or discharging non-image areas (G03G0015360000, G03G0021060000 take precedence)
for discharging non-image areas

title.ko: 이미지상에 따른 대전장치, 예. 광도전성 제어 스크린, 광학적으로 활성화된 충전수단
title.en: for imagewise charging, e.g. photoconductive control screen or optically activated charging means
using X-rays, e.g. electroradiography
using internal polarisation
for developing
using a solid developer, e.g. powder developer
using magnetic brush
Removing excess solid developer
using a liquid developer
Removing excess liquid developer e.g. by heat
for transferring a pattern to a second base
of a toner pattern, e.g. a powder pattern
of a charge pattern
for fixing, e.g. by using heat

title.ko: 그룹 G03G 13/02 ～ G03G 13/20까지의 2개이상의 공정의 조합을 포함하는 것(G03G 15/01이 우선)
title.en: involving the combination of more than one step according to groups G03G0013020000-G03G0013200000 (G03G0015010000 takes precedence)
specially adapted for copying both sides of an original or for copying on both sides of a recording or image-receiving material
whereby at least two steps are performed simultaneously

title.ko: 상전체를 투영함으로써 대전상을 얻은 것, 즉 전체투영(G03G 15/04가 우선)
title.en: in which the charge pattern is obtained by projection of the entire image, i.e. whole-frame projection (G03G0015040000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 투영이 라인 주사에 의한 것(G03G 15/04가 우선)
title.en: in which projection is obtained by line scanning (G03G0015040000 takes precedence)
in which projection is formed on a drum

title.ko: 대전상이 점상으로 형성되는 것(G03G 15/04, G03G 15/05, G03G 15/34가 우선)
title.en: in which the charge pattern is formed dotwise (G03G0015040000, G03G0015050000, G03G0015340000 take precedence)
in which the powder image is formed directly on the recording material
Editing, i.e. producing a composite image by copying one or more original images or parts thereof

title.ko: 열가소성 수지층의 변형을 이용하는 전자사진법(표면 변형화상을 위한 층 G03G 5/022) 그를 위한 장치
title.en: Electrographic processes using deformation of thermoplastic layers (layers for surface-deformation imaging G03G0005022000); Apparatus therefor

title.ko: 대전상 이외의 상을 이용하는 전자사진(Electrographic) 공정, 예. 전기 전도성상; 영동을 포함하는 공정, 예. 광전기영동, 광전자솔로그래피; 선택전사를 포함하는 공정, 예. 전자사진점착 공정; 본질적으로 단일의 그러한 공정을 포함하는 장치
title.en: Electrographic processes using patterns other than charge patterns, e.g. an electric conductivity pattern; Processes involving a migration, e.g. photoelectrophoresis, photoelectrosolography; Processes involving a selective transfer, e.g. electrophoto-adhesive processes; Apparatus essentially involving a single such process
with electrolytic development
using photoelectrophoresis
Apparatus therefor
using an electrophoto-adhesive process, e.g. manifold imaging

title.ko: 입자 이동 화상형성법을 이용한 것, 예. 광전자솔로그래피(photoectrosolography) (G03G17/04가 우선)
title.en: using migration imaging, e.g. photoelectrosolography (G03G0017040000 takes precedence)
Processes using magnetic patterns; Apparatus therefor

title.ko: 그룹 G03G13/00 ～ G03G19/00까지 분류가 되지 않는 장치, 예. 클리닝, 잔류전하의 제거
title.en: Arrangements not provided for by groups G03G0013000000-G03G0019000000, e.g. cleaning, elimination of residual charge
Counting the number of copies; Billing
Preventing copies being made of an original
Eliminating residual charges from a reusable imaging member
using optical radiation
Collecting or recycling waste developer
Toner waste containers
Electronic sequencing control
Mechanical means for facilitating the maintenance of the apparatus, e.g. modular arrangements
using a processing cartridge
Humidity or temperature control
